## Fonts

## @font-face Declarations

```css
@font-face { font-family: "Quadrant Text Mono"; src: url("/fonts/QuadrantTextMono-Regular.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/QuadrantTextMono-Regular.woff") format("woff"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }

@font-face { font-family: "ABC Oracle"; src: url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Light.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Light.woff") format("woff"); font-weight: 300; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }

@font-face { font-family: "ABC Oracle"; src: url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Book.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Book.woff") format("woff"); font-weight: 350; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }

@font-face { font-family: "ABC Oracle"; src: url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Regular.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Regular.woff") format("woff"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }

@font-face { font-family: "ABC Oracle"; src: url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Medium.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Medium.woff") format("woff"); font-weight: 500; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }

@font-face { font-family: "ABC Oracle"; src: url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Bold.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/ABCOracle-Bold.woff") format("woff"); font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }

@font-face { font-family: "ABC Oracle Triple"; src: url("/fonts/ABCOracleTriple-Regular.woff2") format("woff2"), url("/fonts/ABCOracleTriple-Regular.woff") format("woff"), url("/fonts/ABCOracleTriple-Regular.otf") format("opentype"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: swap; }
```


## Raw rules

```css
*, ::after, ::before { --tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-sla

::backdrop { --tw-border-spacing-x: 0; --tw-border-spacing-y: 0; --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; --tw-rotate: 0; --tw-skew-x: 0; --tw-skew-y: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-pan-x: ; --tw-pan-y: ; --tw-pinch-zoom: ; --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity; --tw-gradient-from-position: ; --tw-gradient-via-position: ; --tw-gradient-to-position: ; --tw-ordinal: ; --tw-slashed-zero:

*, ::after, ::before { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; }

::after, ::before { --tw-content: ""; }

:host, html { line-height: 1.5; text-size-adjust: 100%; tab-size: 4; font-family: "ABC Oracle", Helvetica, sans-serif; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }

body { margin: 0px; line-height: inherit; }

hr { height: 0px; color: inherit; border-top-width: 1px; }

abbr:where([title]) { text-decoration: underline dotted; }

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; }

a { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; }

b, strong { font-weight: bolder; }

code, kbd, pre, samp { font-family: "ABC Favorit Mono", monospace; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-size: 1em; }

small { font-size: 80%; }

sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-align: baseline; }

sub { bottom: -0.25em; }

sup { top: -0.5em; }

table { text-indent: 0px; border-color: inherit; border-collapse: collapse; }

button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { font-family: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; font-size: 100%; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; color: inherit; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

button, select { text-transform: none; }

button, input:where([type="button"]), input:where([type="reset"]), input:where([type="submit"]) { appearance: button; background-color: transparent; background-image: none; }

progress { vertical-align: baseline; }

::-webkit-inner-spin-button, ::-webkit-outer-spin-button { height: auto; }

[type="search"] { appearance: textfield; outline-offset: -2px; }

::-webkit-search-decoration { appearance: none; }

::-webkit-file-upload-button { appearance: button; font: inherit; }

summary { display: list-item; }

blockquote, dd, dl, figure, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, hr, p, pre { margin: 0px; }

fieldset { margin: 0px; }

fieldset, legend { padding: 0px; }

menu, ol, ul { list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }

dialog { padding: 0px; }

textarea { resize: vertical; }

input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder { opacity: 1; color: rgb(156, 163, 175); }

[role="button"], button { cursor: pointer; }

:disabled { cursor: default; }

audio, canvas, embed, iframe, img, object, svg, video { display: block; vertical-align: middle; }

img, video { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }

[hidden]:where(:not([hidden="until-found"])) { display: none; }

.\!container { width: 100% !important; }

.container { width: 100%; }

.rich-text--release-note {
  & h1, & h2, & h3, & h4 { margin-top: 1rem; margin-bottom: 0.8rem; font-family: "Exposure VAR", serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 550; line-height: 2rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
  @media (min-width: 800px) {
  & h1, & h2, & h3, & h4 { margin-top: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 2.4rem; line-height: 2.6rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
}
}

.h1, h1 { font-size: 4.8rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 5.2rem; letter-spacing: -0.04em; }

.h2, h2 { font-size: 3.6rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 4.1rem; letter-spacing: -0.04em; }

.h3, h3 { font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 3rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.h4, h4 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 2.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.p1 { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 2.2rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.p1--body { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; }

.p2 { line-height: 2rem; }

.p2, .p2--body { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 400; }

.p2--body { line-height: 1.5; }

.testimonial { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 2.4rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.caption { font-size: 1.3rem; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }

.caption, .mono-body { font-family: "ABC Favorit Mono", monospace; font-weight: 400; }

.mono-body { font-size: 1.4rem; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.oracle-14 { font-family: "ABC Oracle", Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1.4rem; line-height: 2rem; }

.exposure-18 { font-size: 1.8rem; line-height: 2rem; }

.exposure-18, .exposure-24 { font-family: "Exposure VAR", serif; font-weight: 550; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

.exposure-24 { font-size: 2.4rem; line-height: 2.6rem; }

.exposure-36 { font-size: 3.6rem; font-weight: 550; line-height: 4rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

.exposure-36, .h2--exposure { font-family: "Exposure VAR", serif; }

.h2--exposure { font-size: 3.2rem; font-weight: 650; line-height: 3.8rem; letter-spacing: -0.05em; }

.h2--exposure { font-variation-settings: "EXPO" -25; }

.sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); white-space: nowrap; border-width: 0px; }

.shadow-tool-tip { --tw-shadow-color: #262626; --tw-shadow: var(--tw-shadow-colored); }

.outline { outline-style: solid; }

.ring, .ring-1 { box-shadow: var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow),var(--tw-ring-shadow),var(--tw-shadow,0 0 #0000); }

.ring-1 { --tw-ring-offset-shadow: var(--tw-ring-inset) 0 0 0 var(--tw-ring-offset-width) var(--tw-ring-offset-color); --tw-ring-shadow: var(--tw-ring-inset) 0 0 0 calc(1px + var(--tw-ring-offset-width)) var(--tw-ring-color); }

.ring-inset { --tw-ring-inset: inset; }

.ring-white\/10 { --tw-ring-color: #F8F8F81A; }

.blur { --tw-blur: blur(8px); }

.blur, .blur-\[32px\] { filter: var(--tw-blur) var(--tw-brightness) var(--tw-contrast) var(--tw-grayscale) var(--tw-hue-rotate) var(--tw-invert) var(--tw-saturate) var(--tw-sepia) var(--tw-drop-shadow); }

.blur-\[32px\] { --tw-blur: blur(32px); }

.blur-xl { --tw-blur: blur(24px); }

.blur-xl, .contrast-150 { filter: var(--tw-blur) var(--tw-brightness) var(--tw-contrast) var(--tw-grayscale) var(--tw-hue-rotate) var(--tw-invert) var(--tw-saturate) var(--tw-sepia) var(--tw-drop-shadow); }

.contrast-150 { --tw-contrast: contrast(1.5); }

.drop-shadow { --tw-drop-shadow: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0/0.1)) drop-shadow(0 1px 1px rgb(0 0 0/0.06)); }

.drop-shadow, .invert { filter: var(--tw-blur) var(--tw-brightness) var(--tw-contrast) var(--tw-grayscale) var(--tw-hue-rotate) var(--tw-invert) var(--tw-saturate) var(--tw-sepia) var(--tw-drop-shadow); }

.invert { --tw-invert: invert(100%); }

.backdrop-blur { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(8px); }

.backdrop-blur-\[0px\] { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(0px); }

.backdrop-blur-\[16px\] { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(16px); }

.backdrop-blur-\[5px\] { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(5px); }

.backdrop-blur-lg { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(16px); }

.backdrop-blur-lg, .backdrop-blur-md { backdrop-filter: var(--tw-backdrop-blur) var(--tw-backdrop-brightness) var(--tw-backdrop-contrast) var(--tw-backdrop-grayscale) var(--tw-backdrop-hue-rotate) var(--tw-backdrop-invert) var(--tw-backdrop-opacity) var(--tw-backdrop-saturate) var(--tw-backdrop-sepia); }

.backdrop-blur-md { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(12px); }

.backdrop-blur-sm { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(4px); }

.backdrop-blur-sm, .backdrop-blur-xl { backdrop-filter: var(--tw-backdrop-blur) var(--tw-backdrop-brightness) var(--tw-backdrop-contrast) var(--tw-backdrop-grayscale) var(--tw-backdrop-hue-rotate) var(--tw-backdrop-invert) var(--tw-backdrop-opacity) var(--tw-backdrop-saturate) var(--tw-backdrop-sepia); }

.backdrop-blur-xl { --tw-backdrop-blur: blur(24px); }

.backdrop-filter { backdrop-filter: var(--tw-backdrop-blur) var(--tw-backdrop-brightness) var(--tw-backdrop-contrast) var(--tw-backdrop-grayscale) var(--tw-backdrop-hue-rotate) var(--tw-backdrop-invert) var(--tw-backdrop-opacity) var(--tw-backdrop-saturate) var(--tw-backdrop-sepia); }

.transition { transition-property: color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke, opacity, box-shadow, transform, filter, backdrop-filter; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-\[grid-template-rows\] { transition-property: grid-template-rows; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-\[opacity\,transform\] { transition-property: opacity, transform; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-\[transform\,opacity\] { transition-property: transform, opacity; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-all { transition-property: all; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-colors { transition-property: color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-opacity { transition-property: opacity; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-shadow { transition-property: box-shadow; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.transition-transform { transition-property: transform; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.duration-100 { transition-duration: 0.1s; }

.duration-150 { transition-duration: 0.15s; }

.duration-200 { transition-duration: 0.2s; }

.duration-300 { transition-duration: 0.3s; }

.duration-400 { transition-duration: 0.4s; }

.ease-\[cubic-bezier\(0\.76\,0\,0\.24\,1\)\] { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1); }

.ease-in-out { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.ease-out { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); }

.ease-site-ease { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.87, 0, 0.13, 1); }

.will-change-\[opacity\,filter\] { will-change: opacity, filter; }

.will-change-\[opacity\,transform\] { will-change: opacity, transform; }

.will-change-\[opacity\] { will-change: opacity; }

.will-change-transform { will-change: transform; }

.text-balance { text-wrap: balance; }

.\[--banner-width\:40px\] { --banner-width: 40px; }

.\[-webkit-mask-image\:linear-gradient\(180deg\,black_0\%\,black_50\%\,transparent_100\%\)\] { mask-image: linear-gradient(black, black 50%, transparent); }

.\[-webkit-mask-image\:linear-gradient\(to_bottom\,rgba\(0\,0\,0\,1\)_0\%\,rgba\(0\,0\,0\,0\)_100\%\)\] { mask-image: linear-gradient(rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)); }

.\[clip-path\:inset\(0_0_33\.33\%_0\)\] { clip-path: inset(0px 0px 33.33%); }

.\[contain\:layout\] { contain: layout; }

.\[contain\:layout_paint\] { contain: layout paint; }

.\[filter\:blur\(20px\)\] { filter: blur(20px); }

.\[filter\:drop-shadow\(0_2px_4px_rgba\(0\,0\,0\,0\.10\)\)_drop-shadow\(0_18px_24px_rgba\(0\,0\,0\,0\.12\)\)_drop-shadow\(0_40px_64px_rgba\(0\,0\,0\,0\.18\)\)\] { filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 2px 4px) drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 18px 24px) drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18) 0px 40px 64px); }

.\[mask-image\:linear-gradient\(180deg\,black_0\%\,black_50\%\,transparent_100\%\)\] { mask-image: linear-gradient(black, black 50%, transparent); }

.\[mask-image\:linear-gradient\(to_bottom\,rgba\(0\,0\,0\,1\)_0\%\,rgba\(0\,0\,0\,0\)_100\%\)\] { mask-image: linear-gradient(rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)); }

.\[transform\:translateZ\(0\)\] { transform: translateZ(0px); }

:root { --current: currentColor; --transparent: transparent; --black: #000000; --black-50: #00000080; --black-10: #0000001A; --black-8: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); --header-background: #dddddd77; --white: #F8F8F8; --white-50: #F8F8F880; --white-10: #F8F8F81A; --red: #FA3D1D; --red-50: #FA3D1D80; --red-10: #FA3D1D1A; --blue: #0358F7; --blue-50: #0358F780; --blue-10: #0358F71A; --pink: #FD02F5; --pink-50: #FD

.dark { --primary: #FFFFFF; --secondary: rgba(255,255,255,0.80); --tertiary: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); --quaternary: rgba(255,255,255,0.40); --fill-primary: #FFFFFF; --fill-secondary: rgba(255,255,255,0.20); --fill-secondary-hover: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); --fill-tertiary: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); --stroke-light: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); --stroke-medium: rgba(255,255,255,0.20); --get-dia-button-hover: 

.gradient { background-size: cover; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: 50% center; }

.gradient-creamsicle { background-image: var(--creamsicle-gradient); }

.gradient-grapefruit { background-image: var(--grapefruit-gradient); }

.gradient-cotton-candy { background-image: var(--cotton-candy-gradient); }

.gradient-sunshine { background-image: var(--sunshine-gradient); }

.gradient-twilight { background-image: var(--twilight-gradient); }

.gradient-midnight { background-image: var(--midnight-gradient); }

.gradient-student { background-image: var(--student-gradient); }

.gradient-student-marquee { background-image: var(--student-marquee); }

.gradient-fade-mask { mask-image: linear-gradient(black, black 85%, transparent); }

.site-grid { padding-left: 1rem; padding-right: 1rem; }

.site-grid, .site-grid--internal { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, minmax(0px, 1fr)); column-gap: 2rem; }

.site-padding { padding-left: 1rem; padding-right: 1rem; }

[data-marquee] { position: relative; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; }

[data-marquee-inner] { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="right"] [data-marquee-inner] { justify-content: flex-end; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="down"] [data-marquee-inner], [data-marquee][data-direction="up"] [data-marquee-inner] { flex-direction: column; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="down"] [data-marquee-inner] { justify-content: flex-end; }

[data-marquee-content] { display: flex; flex: 0 0 auto; min-width: 100%; min-height: 100%; animation-timing-function: linear; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-play-state: running; will-change: transform; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="down"] [data-marquee-content], [data-marquee][data-direction="up"] [data-marquee-content] { flex-direction: column; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="left"] [data-marquee-content] { animation-name: marqueeL; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="right"] [data-marquee-content] { animation-name: marqueeR; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="up"] [data-marquee-content] { animation-name: marqueeU; }

[data-marquee][data-direction="down"] [data-marquee-content] { animation-name: marqueeD; }

[data-marquee][data-pause-on-hover]:hover [data-marquee-content] { animation-play-state: paused; }

[data-marquee-item] { flex: 0 0 auto; }

[data-dia-marquee] { position: relative; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; }

[data-dia-marquee-inner] { display: flex; }

[data-dia-marquee][data-direction="right"] [data-dia-marquee-inner] { justify-content: flex-end; }

[data-dia-marquee-content] { display: flex; flex: 1 0 auto; animation-timing-function: linear; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-play-state: running; will-change: transform; }

[data-dia-marquee][data-direction="left"] [data-dia-marquee-content] { animation-name: diaMarqueeL; }

[data-dia-marquee][data-direction="right"] [data-dia-marquee-content] { animation-name: diaMarqueeR; }

[data-dia-marquee][data-pause-on-hover]:hover [data-dia-marquee-content] { animation-play-state: paused; }

[data-dia-marquee-item] { flex-grow: 0; }

.fade-container--header {
  position: relative;
  &::after, &::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; height: 100%; width: 50px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); z-index: 10; pointer-events: none; }
  &::before { left: 0px; mask-image: linear-gradient(270deg, transparent 1%, rgb(0, 0, 0)); }
  &::after { right: 0px; left: auto; mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 1%, r

.fade-container--social {
  position: relative;
  &::after, &::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; height: 100%; width: 50px; background-color: rgb(248, 248, 248); z-index: 9; pointer-events: none; }
  &::before { left: 0px; mask-image: linear-gradient(270deg, transparent 1%, rgb(248, 248, 248)); }
  &::after { right: 0px; left: auto; mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 

.fade-container--students {
  @media (min-width: 1800px) {
  position: relative;
  &::after, &::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; height: 100%; width: 150px; background-color: rgb(248, 248, 248); z-index: 9; pointer-events: none; }
  &::before { left: 0px; mask-image: linear-gradient(270deg, transparent 1%, rgb(248, 248, 248)); }
  &::after { right: 0px; left: auto; mask-image: l

.fade-container--scroll-top {
  &::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; background-color: rgb(248, 248, 248); z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; height: 275px; mask-image: linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 1%, rgb(248, 248, 248) 50%); }
  @media (min-width: 800px) {
  &::before { height: 300px; }
}
  @media (min-width: 1000px) {
  &::before { height: 375px; }
}

.fade-container--scroll-bottom {
  &::before { position: absolute; content: ""; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; background-color: rgb(248, 248, 248); mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 1%, rgb(248, 248, 248) 80%); z-index: 10; pointer-events: none; height: 150px; }
}

.button-base { background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; user-select: none; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); }

.button-base:focus { outline: none; }

.button-base.disabled, .button-base:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.6; }

.button-base.disabled.loading, .button-base.disabled.loading *, .button-base:disabled.loading, .button-base:disabled.loading * { cursor: wait !important; }

.button-base.disabled:focus, .button-base.disabled:hover, .button-base:disabled:focus, .button-base:disabled:hover { opacity: 0.6; }

.button-base.cs--loading, .button-base.cs--loading *, .button-base.loading, .button-base.loading * { cursor: wait !important; }

.button-base.block { display: block; }

.button, button { background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-align: center; user-select: none; appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); }

.button--primary { background-color: var(--neon); color: var(--black); font-family: "Courier New", Courier, monospace; padding: 0px 3.2rem; height: 4.5rem; text-align: center; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.215, 0.61, 0.355, 1), color 0.2s; font-size: 2rem; line-height: 4.5rem; width: max-content; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; }

.pulse { animation: 1.25s cubic-bezier(0.87, 0, 0.13, 1) 0s infinite alternate none running pulse; will-change: transform, opacity, filter; }

.button--cta {
  transition: background-color 0.2s ease-in-out;
  &:hover { background-color: rgb(66, 66, 66); }
}

.touch-hitbox {
  position: relative;
  &::before { content: ""; position: absolute; display: block; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 36px; min-width: 36px; z-index: 9999; }
  @media (min-width: 800px) {
  &::before { display: none; }
}
}

.release-note-video-hitbox {
  position: relative;
  &::before { content: ""; position: absolute; display: block; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -95%) scale(1); height: 150px; width: 150px; z-index: 9999; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) 0.2s; border-radius: 100%; }
  &[data-expanded="true"] {
  &::before { transform: translate(-52%, -105%) scale(1.

html { font-size: 62.5%; font-family: "ABC Oracle", Helvetica, "sans-serif"; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; text-size-adjust: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; }

*, ::after, ::before, button { box-sizing: inherit; }

input, select, textarea { appearance: none; border-radius: 0px; }

.font-variable-25, .variable-25 { font-variation-settings: "EXPO" -25; }

.link--cover {
  &::after { content: ""; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 0px; z-index: 3; }
}

.link--opacity {
  transition: opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 1, 0.9, 1);
  &:hover { opacity: 0.6; }
}

.link--opacity--hover {
  width: fit-content; text-decoration: underline 1px; text-underline-offset: 2px; transition: text-decoration-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 1, 0.9, 1);
  &:focus, &:hover { text-decoration-color: transparent; }
}

.link--underline--hover {
  transition: text-decoration-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 1, 0.9, 1);
  &:focus, &:hover { text-decoration-color: currentcolor; }
}

.hover--underline {
  position: relative;
  &::after { position: absolute; bottom: -1px; height: 1px; left: 0px; content: ""; width: 100%; background: currentcolor; transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1), color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1); transform-origin: right top; }
  &.active, &:active, &:focus, &:hover {
  &::after { transform: scale(1); tra

.link--underline {
  width: fit-content; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 2px; transition: text-decoration-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1);
  &:focus, &:hover { text-decoration-color: transparent; }
}

.link--underline--hover {
  width: fit-content; text-decoration: underline transparent; text-underline-offset: 2px; transition: text-decoration-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1);
  &:focus, &:hover { text-decoration-color: currentcolor; }
}

.line-break {
  & p {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  &:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; }
}
  & ol li, & ul li {
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  &:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; }
}
  & h1, & h2, & h3, & ol, & ul {
  margin-bottom: 1em;
  &:last-child, & ol, & ul { margin-bottom: 0px; }
}
  @media (min-width: 1000px) {
  & ol, & p, & ul {
  margin-bottom: 1em;
  &:last-child, & ol, & ul { margin-bottom: 0px; }

.rich-text {
  & p {
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  &:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; }
}
  & ol li, & ul li {
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  &:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; }
}
  & a {
  width: fit-content; text-decoration: underline transparent; text-underline-offset: 2px; color: var(--primary); transition: text-decoration-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1);
  &:focus, &:hover { text-decoration-c

.citrine-bold { font-variation-settings: "wght" 700; }

.chroma-mask {
  position: absolute; inset: 0px; height: 100%; width: 100%;
  &::after { content: ""; pointer-events: none; position: absolute; z-index: 10; height: 150vh; width: 150vw; --tw-bg-opacity: 1; background-color: rgb(248 248 248/var(--tw-bg-opacity,1)); object-fit: cover; }
  @media (min-width: 800px) {
  &::after { width: 112.5vw; }
}
  &::after { top: calc(-25vh); left: calc(-25vw); m

.chroma-hero {
  display: flex; overflow: clip; position: relative;
  &::after { position: absolute; content: ""; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; height: 75px; background-color: rgb(248, 248, 248); z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; mask-image: linear-gradient(transparent 0px, rgb(248, 248, 248) 90%); }
}

.chroma-column { flex: 1 0 0%; min-width: 0px; }

.chroma-background {
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgb(52, 11, 5), rgb(3, 88, 247) 18.27%, rgb(80, 146, 199) 28.37%, rgb(225, 225, 254) 41.35%, rgb(255, 212, 0) 58.66%, rgb(250, 61, 29) 68.27%, rgb(253, 2, 245) 73.08%, transparent); filter: blur(5px);
  @media (min-width: 800px) {
  filter: blur(9px);
}
}

.chroma-text { background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px, rgb(0, 0, 0) 33.33%, rgb(198, 121, 196) 40%, rgb(250, 61, 29) 45%, rgb(255, 176, 5) 50%, rgb(225, 225, 254) 55%, rgb(3, 88, 247) 60%, transparent 66.67%, transparent); background-size: 300% 100%; background-position: 100% 0px; will-change: background-position; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; colo

.chroma-text-animate { animation: 0.9s ease-in-out 0.1s 1 normal forwards running chroma-sweep; filter: blur(1px); }

.chroma-text-out { background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0px, transparent 33.33%, rgb(198, 121, 196) 40%, rgb(250, 61, 29) 45%, rgb(255, 176, 5) 50%, rgb(225, 225, 254) 55%, rgb(3, 88, 247) 60%, rgb(0, 0, 0) 66.67%, rgb(0, 0, 0)), linear-gradient(270deg, transparent 0px, transparent 33.33%, rgb(198, 121, 196) 40%, rgb(250, 61, 29) 45%, rgb(255, 176, 5) 50%, rgb(225, 225, 254) 55%, r

.chroma-text-out-animate { animation: 0.85s ease-in-out 0.6s 1 normal forwards running chroma-expand-bidirectional; }

.dark-chroma-background { background-image: url("/images/dark-background.png"); background-size: cover; background-position: 100% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; }

.chroma-text--pro { background: linear-gradient(270deg, rgb(255, 255, 255) 7%, rgb(194, 216, 255) 30%, rgb(209, 235, 255) 41%, rgb(239, 216, 255) 54%, rgb(255, 255, 255) 62%, rgb(255, 255, 255) 76%, rgb(255, 240, 167) 86%, rgb(255, 198, 188)) 0px 0px / 100% 100% no-repeat text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; color: currentcolor; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

.chroma-pill { background-image: url("/images/pill-background.png"); background-size: cover; background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; }

.pro-chroma-heading { background: linear-gradient(134deg, rgb(136, 136, 136) -6.12%, rgb(255, 255, 255) 99.93%) text; }

.chroma-text-animate-repeat, .pro-chroma-heading { background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }

.chroma-text-animate-repeat { background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, black 0px, black 33.33%, rgb(198, 121, 196) 40%, rgb(250, 61, 29) 45%, rgb(255, 176, 5) 50%, rgb(225, 225, 254) 55%, rgb(3, 88, 247) 60%, black 66.67%, black); background-size: 300% 100%; background-position: 100% 0px; will-change: background-position; background-clip: text; color: transparent; }

.skill-card:has(.skill-card--intersected) .chroma-text-animate-repeat { animation: 4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) 0.5s infinite normal none running chroma-sweep-repeat; }

@property --grad-primary-1 { syntax: "<color>"; inherits: false; initial-value: #340b05; }

@property --grad-primary-2 { syntax: "<color>"; inherits: false; initial-value: #0358f7; }

@property --grad-primary-3 { syntax: "<color>"; inherits: false; initial-value: rgba(225,225,254,.2); }

@property --cone-angle { syntax: "<angle>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0deg; }

@property --rotation-angle { syntax: "<angle>"; inherits: false; initial-value: 0deg; }

.border-gradient-primary { transition: --grad-primary-1 0.3s, --grad-primary-2 0.3s, --grad-primary-3 0.3s; }

.skill-card--new { position: absolute; inset: 0px; border-radius: 25px; z-index: -1; overflow: hidden; }

.skill-card--new.border-gradient-primary::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: 25px; z-index: -20; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.87, 0, 0.13, 1); }

.skill-card--new.border-gradient-primary::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: -1px -1px -1px -150%; border-radius: 300px; padding: 1px; z-index: -10; filter: blur(2px); opacity: 0.66; width: 150%; height: calc(100% + 2px); background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(52, 11, 5) 0px, rgb(3, 88, 247) 20%, rgb(225, 225, 254) 40%, rgb(255, 176, 5) 60%, rgb(250, 61, 29) 80%, rgb(198, 121, 196)); 

.skill-card--new.skill-card--intersected.border-gradient-primary::after { animation: 4s ease-in-out 0.5s 1 normal none running border-gradient-sweep; }

.skill-card--new.border-gradient-primary:hover::after { filter: blur(1px) brightness(1.1); opacity: 1; }

.border-gradient-static::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: -1px -1px -1px 0px; border-radius: 26px; padding: 1px; z-index: -10; filter: blur(2px); opacity: 0.4; width: 100%; height: calc(100% + 2px); background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); mask: linear-gradient(rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px) content-box, linear-gradient(rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px); trans

.border-gradient-static:hover::after { filter: blur(1px); opacity: 0.6; }

.skill-card { z-index: 1; display: flex; height: 100%; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 2.4rem; --tw-bg-opacity: 1; background-color: rgb(255 255 255/var(--tw-bg-opacity,1)); padding: 0.1rem; transition: 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.87, 0, 0.13, 1); position: relative; }

.skill-card:focus-visible { --tw-shadow: 0px 12px 20px 0px rgba(10,18,36,0.10); --tw-shadow-colored: 0px 12px 20px 0px var(--tw-shadow-color); box-shadow: var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-ring-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-shadow); }

.skill-card__inner { position: relative; z-index: 10; display: flex; height: 100%; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 2.4rem; --tw-bg-opacity: 1; background-color: rgb(255 255 255/var(--tw-bg-opacity,1)); padding: 1.6rem; --tw-shadow-colored: 0px 4px 12px 0px var(--tw-shadow-color); --tw-shadow-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.12); --tw-shadow: var(--tw-shadow-colored); transition: 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.87, 

.skill-card__inner, .skill-card__inner:hover { box-shadow: var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-ring-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-shadow); }

.skill-card__inner:hover { --tw-shadow: 0px 12px 20px 0px rgba(10,18,36,0.10); --tw-shadow-colored: 0px 12px 20px 0px var(--tw-shadow-color); }

.skill-card__inner:focus-visible { --tw-shadow: 0px 12px 20px 0px rgba(10,18,36,0.10); --tw-shadow-colored: 0px 12px 20px 0px var(--tw-shadow-color); box-shadow: var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-ring-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-shadow); }

.skill-card:hover .skill-card__inner { --tw-shadow: 0px 12px 20px 0px rgba(10,18,36,0.10); --tw-shadow-colored: 0px 12px 20px 0px var(--tw-shadow-color); box-shadow: var(--tw-ring-offset-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-ring-shadow,0 0 #0000),var(--tw-shadow); }

.skill-card--new.border-gradient-primary:hover::before { border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); }

.skill-card__inner--gallery { padding-top: 2.6rem; }

.skill-card:not(.skill-card--new) .skill-card__inner::before { content: ""; position: absolute; z-index: 0; display: block; border-radius: 2.4rem; border-width: 1px; border-color: var(--stroke-light); }

.button-base.skill-card:not(.skill-card--new) .skill-card__inner::before { display: block; }

.skill-card:not(.skill-card--new) .skill-card__inner::before { inset: -1px; transition: border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.87, 0, 0.13, 1); }

.skill-card:not(.skill-card--new) .skill-card__inner:hover::before { border-color: var(--stroke-medium); }

.fade-to-black-text { background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(42, 42, 42) 0px, rgb(154, 154, 154) 55%, transparent 60%, transparent); background-size: 250% 100%; background-position: 100% 0px; will-change: background-position; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; color: transparent; -webkit-box-decoration-break: clone; box-decoration-break: clone; }

.dark .fade-to-black-text { background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(237, 237, 237) 0px, rgb(138, 138, 138) 55%, transparent 60%, transparent); }

.fade-to-black-text-animate { animation: fade-to-black-sweep 1.2s ease-in-out var(--animation-delay,.1s) forwards; }

.getting-started-sunrise { border-radius: 1800px; opacity: 0.64; background: linear-gradient(180deg,#fa3d1d 2%,#ffd400 6%,#ddc3f0 15.38%,#5092c7 17%,#0358f7 20%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--background) 10%,transparent) 50%,transparent 91%); filter: blur(50px); }

.getting-started-line { background: linear-gradient(rgba(17, 17, 17, 0), rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.1) 25%, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.1) 75%, rgba(17, 17, 17, 0)); }

:root.dark .getting-started-line { background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 25%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 75%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)); }

.footer-column--col-a { height: 340px; }

.footer-column--col-b { height: 318px; }

.footer-column--col-c { height: 287px; }

.footer-column--col-d { height: 250px; }

.footer-column--col-e { height: 212px; }

.footer-column--col-f { height: 175px; }

.keen-slider.keen-slider--skill, .keen-slider:not([data-keen-slider-disabled]):not([data-keen-slider-disabled]) {
  overflow: visible;
  @media (min-width: 1000px) {
  overflow: hidden;
}
}

div[blossom-carousel] {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding-left: 2rem; padding-right: 2rem; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; scroll-snap-stop: always;
  & button { scroll-snap-align: center; }
}

.svg-dashed-border-pattern { position: relative; }

.svg-dashed-border-pattern > svg.dashed-border-svg { position: absolute; inset: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; border-radius: 12px; z-index: 2; }

html { transition: background-color 0.2s ease-in-out, color 0.2s ease-in-out; background-color: var(--background); color: var(--primary); }

.overlay { pointer-events: none; position: absolute; inset: 0px; z-index: 10; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); }

body { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

body.no-scroll, html.no-scroll { overflow: hidden; touch-action: none; }

.\[\&_h2\]\:h2 h2 { font-size: 3.6rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 4.1rem; letter-spacing: -0.04em; }

.\[\&_h2\]\:h3 h2 { font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 3rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.\[\&_h3\]\:h3 h3 { font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 3rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.\[\&_h3\]\:h4 h3 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 2.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.\[\&_h4\]\:h4 h4 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 2.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.\[\&_h4\]\:p1 h4 { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 2.2rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

.dark\:border-true-white\/10:is(.dark *) { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); }

.dark\:text-white\/85:is(.dark *) { color: rgba(248, 248, 248, 0.85); }

.keen-slider:not([data-keen-slider-disabled]) { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; align-content: flex-start; display: flex; overflow: hidden; position: relative; touch-action: pan-y; user-select: none; width: 100%; }

.keen-slider:not([data-keen-slider-disabled]) .keen-slider__slide { min-height: 100%; overflow: hidden; position: relative; width: 100%; }

.keen-slider:not([data-keen-slider-disabled])[data-keen-slider-reverse] { flex-direction: row-reverse; }

.keen-slider:not([data-keen-slider-disabled])[data-keen-slider-v] { flex-wrap: wrap; }

[blossom-carousel] { display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap; overflow: auto clip; scroll-behavior: smooth; overscroll-behavior-x: contain; list-style-type: none; inline-size: 100%; max-inline-size: 100vw; box-sizing: border-box; scrollbar-width: none; }

[blossom-carousel]:is(ul) { padding-inline-start: 0px; }

[blossom-carousel]::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

[blossom-carousel][has-repeat="true"] { scroll-padding-inline: 50% !important; padding-inline: 50% !important; }

[blossom-carousel][has-snap="true"] { scroll-snap-type: var(--snap-type) !important; }

[blossom-carousel][has-overflow="true"] { cursor: grab; }

[blossom-carousel][has-overflow="true"]:active { cursor: grabbing; }

[blossom-carousel] > * { display: inline-block; white-space: normal; vertical-align: top; }

[blossom-carousel] * { -webkit-user-drag: none; user-select: none; }

:root { --apollo-sidebar-button-size: 40px; --apollo-sidebar-icon-size: 20px; --apollo-sidebar-hover-bg: #0000000a; --apollo-sidebar-focus-bg: #00000014; --apollo-sidebar-hover-opacity: 0.8; --apollo-sidebar-transition: all 0.2s ease; --apollo-sidebar-z-input: 2; --apollo-sidebar-z-icon: 1; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper { align-items: center; cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: center; position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:hover .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] :is(.apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus, .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-within) .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: var(--apollo-sidebar-focus-bg); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-visible { outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-container { align-items: center; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); justify-content: center; min-height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); min-width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: inherit; cursor: pointer; height: 100%; left: 0px; opacity: 0; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: 100%; z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-input); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:focus { box-shadow: none; outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:hover { box-shadow: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon { flex-shrink: 0; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); pointer-events: none; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-icon); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon[style*="display: none"]::before { content: "⚪"; display: block; font-size: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }

/* === @keyframes === */

@keyframes marqueeL { 
  0% { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  100% { transform: translate3d(-100%, 0px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes marqueeR { 
  0% { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  100% { transform: translate3d(100%, 0px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes marqueeU { 
  0% { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  100% { transform: translate3d(0px, -100%, 0px); }
}

@keyframes marqueeD { 
  0% { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  100% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); }
}

@keyframes diaMarqueeL { 
  0% { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  100% { transform: translate3d(-100%, 0px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes diaMarqueeR { 
  0% { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  100% { transform: translate3d(100%, 0px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes pulse { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.5); filter: blur(2px); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); filter: blur(0px); }
}

@keyframes pulse-scale { 
  0% { transform: scale(1); }
  100% { transform: scale(0.75); }
}

@keyframes chroma-sweep { 
  0% { background-position: 100% 0px; filter: blur(1px); }
  100% { background-position: 0px 0px; filter: blur(0px); }
}

@keyframes chroma-expand-bidirectional { 
  0% { background-position: 100% 0px, 100% 0px; }
  100% { background-position: 0px 0px, 0px 0px; }
}

@keyframes chroma-sweep-repeat { 
  0% { background-position: 100% 0px; }
  50% { background-position: 0px 0px; }
  50.1% { background-position: 100% 0px; }
  100% { background-position: 100% 0px; }
}

@keyframes border-gradient-sweep { 
  0% { left: -150%; }
  50% { left: 100%; }
  50.1% { left: -150%; }
  100% { left: -150%; }
}

@keyframes fade-to-black-sweep { 
  0% { background-position: 100% 0px; }
  100% { background-position: 0px 0px; }
}

@keyframes x_ux1ny { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes x_hVk6U { 
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes x_VaPMP { 
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes bounceIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  20% { transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  40% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.03, 1.03, 1.03); }
  80% { transform: scale3d(0.97, 0.97, 0.97); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); }
}

@keyframes bounceOut { 
  20% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  50%, 55% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
}

@keyframes fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes bounceInDown { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -3000px, 0px); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 25px, 0px); }
  75% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  90% { transform: translate3d(0px, 5px, 0px); }
  100% { transform: none; }
}

@keyframes bounceOutUp { 
  20% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  40%, 45% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 20px, 0px); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -2000px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes x_z27ww { 
  0% { transform: translateX(100%); }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px); }
}

@keyframes x_qUXrh { 
  0% { transform: translateX(0px); }
  100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

@keyframes x_edObp { 
  0% { width: 0px; }
  20% { width: 80%; }
  100% { width: 100%; }
}

@keyframes claude-pulse { 
  0% { box-shadow: rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.5) 0px 0px 10px inset, rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.3) 0px 0px 20px inset, rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.1) 0px 0px 30px inset; }
  50% { box-shadow: rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.7) 0px 0px 15px inset, rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.5) 0px 0px 25px inset, rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.2) 0px 0px 35px inset; }
  100% { box-shadow: rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.5) 0px 0px 10px inset, rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.3) 0px 0px 20px inset, rgba(217, 119, 87, 0.1) 0px 0px 30px inset; }
}

}
```
